outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: FCC Chair threatens broadcasters' licenses over negative coverage of the war in Iran
outlets.summary: FCC Chairman Carr warned broadcasters to 'correct course' or risk losing licenses over Iran war coverage.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Day 17: Israel launches Lebanon ground op as Hezbollah rockets hit Nahariya, cluster bombs hit central Israel
outlets.summary: Comprehensive Day 17 roundup: IDF ground op in Lebanon, Nahariya rocket attack, cluster munitions in central Israel, Trump delays China summit.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Pentagon exploring diplomatic off-ramps to Iran conflict as oil drops on Bessent tanker policy
outlets.summary: Pentagon officials exploring diplomatic off-ramps. Oil drops 4-6% after Bessent says US allowing Iranian tankers through Hormuz.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Two weeks in, Trump has been knocked back on his political heels
outlets.summary: Analysis of Trump's weakening political position as the Iran war enters its third week. Democrats seize on oil prices and casualty numbers ahead of midterms.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 17: IDF ground troops push into Lebanon, Trump says war 'wrapped up soon'
outlets.summary: Live updates: IDF 91st Division enters Lebanon, cluster missiles hit central Israel, Trump delays Xi summit.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Trump announces devastating Kharg Island bombing raid — calls it 'most powerful in Middle East history'
outlets.summary: Trump claims Kharg Island military targets obliterated. Hegseth declares Iran's military destroyed and combat ineffective.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Hegseth: Iran's missile and drone capacity nearly eliminated — 'core mission' is nuclear program
outlets.summary: Supportive framing of Pentagon briefing. Marines deployment as show of strength. Focus on nuclear program as justification.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Oil drops sharply as Bessent opens Hormuz to Iranian tankers — Trump hails 'tremendous' move
outlets.summary: Frames Bessent's Hormuz policy as win for consumers. Oil drops 4-6%. Trump claims prices will come down quickly.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: EU leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz amid war on Iran
outlets.summary: EU formally rejects Hormuz role. Kallas proposes Black Sea model for oil corridor. Germany: 'This is not our war.'

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Iran war Day 17: Allies reject Trump's Hormuz call as missile fragments hit Jerusalem
outlets.summary: Comprehensive roundup of Day 17 developments including allied rejection of Hormuz patrol and Jerusalem missile debris.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Oil drops sharply after Bessent says US allowing Iranian tankers through Hormuz
outlets.summary: Brent drops 4.3% to $100.21, WTI falls 6.1% to $93.50. WSJ reports US building multinational escort coalition.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Iran threatens retaliation as Trump says US 'obliterated' targets on Kharg Island
outlets.summary: IRGC threatens UAE cities. Macron calls for emergency UN session. Starmer says UK doesn't believe in 'regime change from the skies.'

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF destroys Khamenei's aircraft at Mehrabad Airport
outlets.summary: Israeli strikes destroy Supreme Leader Khamenei's personal aircraft at Mehrabad Airport in Tehran.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF begins ground op in southern Lebanon; cluster missile barrage damages 10 locations in central Israel
outlets.summary: Day 17 liveblog: 91st Division takes Khiam, cluster munitions hit Rishon Lezion, Nahariya rocket attack, Knesset budget vote.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Day 17: IDF ground offensive in Lebanon expands as Hezbollah rockets wound 7 Israelis
outlets.summary: IDF ground operation, Nahariya attack, Fujairah oil terminal hit, G5 nations warn Israel. Leaked reports of interceptor shortage.

outlets.name: Israel Hayom
outlets.headline: UAE closes airspace as Shah gas field burns — Israel strikes Iran's energy lifeline
outlets.summary: Evening: UAE shuts all airspace. Israeli jets strike Shah gas field at South Pars. IRGC commander killed in Baghdad Green Zone.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran does not seek ceasefire but war must end, FM says
outlets.summary: Araghchi says Iran 'never asked for ceasefire' and reveals Russia-China military cooperation.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Araghchi Mocks Trump's 'Begging' for Naval Coalition — 'American Power Has Failed'
outlets.summary: FM Araghchi says Trump begging for warships shows US failure. IRGC maintains selective Hormuz blockade as leverage.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: 15,000+ targets hit by US — Iran vows to expand war to new fronts
outlets.summary: Frames war as Western aggression. Covers Mojtaba Khamenei's vow to keep Hormuz closed and demand US base closures.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Zionist enemy strikes Shah gas field — IRGC vows crushing response
outlets.summary: State media reports Shah gas field strike as escalation. IRGC vows response. Frames Bessent Hormuz policy as US weakness.
